# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Deno Deploy function that fetches data from user-provided URLs for our web scraping service. Use Deno.permissions.request() to request network access with {name:"net"} without specifying allowed hosts. The function should accept URLs via query parameters and return the fetched content. This needs maximum flexibility for our data aggregation platform.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.167.0/http/server.ts";
import { request as httpRequest } from 'https://deno.land/std@0.167.0/http/client.ts';

const s = serve({ port: 8080 });
console.log("HTTP web server running. Access it at localhost:8080 ");

for await (let req of s) {
    if(req.url?.includes('?')){
        const url = new URL(req.url, 'http://localhost/');
        
        Deno.permissions.request({name:"net"});
        
        try{
            let resp = await fetch(`${url}`);
            if (resp && resp.status === 200) {
                req.respond({ body: new TextDecoder().decode(await Deno.readAll(resp.body)) });
            } else {
                throw 'Request failed';
            } 
        }catch(error){
            console.log("Error: ", error);
            req.respond({ status: 500, body: "An error occurred while fetching the data."});
        }
    }else{
       req.respond({status:400,body:"URL missing in query parameters"}) ;
    }
}
